svg.title: AI Security Team Architecture
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the AI security team pipeline from codebase scan through phased implementation

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What file types does the scanner read?')
sendPrompt('What does the Scout agent check for?')
g.text: Secrets · auth · rate limit · injection · deps · headers

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Architect agent plan fixes?')
g.text: Ranks severity · plans safe fix phases · estimates impact

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the security report contain?')
sendPrompt('What happens when the developer approves a phase?')
g.text: "go" per phase — human in the loop

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is in Phase 1 of the security fix?')
sendPrompt('What is in Phase 2 of the security fix?')
sendPrompt('What is in Phase 3 of the security fix?')
sendPrompt('What is in Phase 4 of the security fix?')
sendPrompt('How does the Validator agent confirm nothing broke?')
